description:
Confused by YouTube Analytics? In this beginner-friendly guide, I walk through the stats available in YouTube Studio, explain which numbers actually matter, and show how I personally use analytics without overthinking them.

https://nexusclips.com/home?via=rob — 10% OFF!

⸻

🧢 WORK WITH ME
 • Book a 1-on-1 Zoom Call: https://calendly.com/robthemaritimer/coaching-strategy-call

⸻

Want to grow your Youtube channel and/or build a business around it?
🚀 START HERE → https://www.robthemaritimer.com/start
All my free guides, community links, and ways to work with me — all in one place.

⸻

🎓 MY COURSES
 • ✅ Camera Confidence 101: https://www.robthemaritimer.com/camera-confidence-minicourse
 • ✅ Over 40 YouTube Starter Course: https://www.robthemaritimer.com/over40-youtube-starter-course
 • ✅ Live Streaming Made Easy: https://www.robthemaritimer.com/live-streaming-made-easy

⸻

🧰 SOFTWARE I USE
 • Epidemic Sound (music & sound effects) – https://share.epidemicsound.com/6ndir1 — 30 days FREE + 50% off for 2 months
 • Nexus Clips (create shorts from your long videos) – https://nexusclips.com/home?via=rob – 10% OFF!
 • Kajabi (all-in-one business platform) – https://app.kajabi.com/r/pmCPerYj/t/seyylndg — 30-day FREE trial!
 • Camtasia (video editing) – https://www.robthemaritimer.com/camtasia — 10% OFF!
 • VidIQ (YouTube growth tools) – https://vidiq.com/robthemaritimer/ — Start today for only $1!
 • Canva (design & thumbnails) – https://partner.canva.com/4eLZm1 — 30-day FREE trial!
 • Ecamm Live (live streaming software) – https://www.ecamm.com/mac/ecammlive/?fp_ref=rob12 — 14-day FREE trial!

⸻

🎥 EQUIPMENT I USE

DJI Mic – https://amzn.to/3XuQJTt
Eucos Selfie Stick – https://amzn.to/3UDzXAw
JOBY GorillaPod – https://amzn.to/3B5WlMj
Quadlock Case – https://amzn.to/3xUII1o
Quadlock Tripod Mount – https://amzn.to/3zPufnO
Sony ZV-E10 Camera – https://amzn.to/3zJATvN
Sigma 16mm f1.4 Lens – https://amzn.to/3SEDSwL
Synco Mic-D2 Shotgun Mic – https://amzn.to/3HIOg0g
Focusrite Scarlett 2i2 – https://amzn.to/3SH4qNX
Stream Deck – https://amzn.to/4mnixnR
Neewer 18” LED Light Panels – https://amzn.to/42fLECj

⸻

By using the affiliate links above, I may earn a small commission if you decide to make a purchase — at no extra cost to you. Your support helps me continue creating helpful content. 🙏

⸻

I’m Rob the Maritimer, and I make videos and host live streams to help people over 40 succeed on YouTube.
I share everything I’ve learned — from software to storytelling — to make your creator journey easier.

⚓ Subscribe for weekly videos and live streams!

Talk soon,
Rob

🌍 Website: https://www.robthemaritimer.com
📸 Instagram: https://www.instagram.com/rob_themaritimer

fulltitle: YouTube Analytics Explained — 2026 Beginner’s Guide (What Really Matters)
